---
title: "20 Plot Dividend Growth"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Intent: show dividend growth over time for top 5 dividend names.
# Includes a typo in theme/legend settings for debugging.
top5_div_symbols <- div_rank %>%
  arrange(div_rank) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pull(symbol)

div_trend <- divs_by_year %>%
  filter(symbol %in% top5_div_symbols)

ggplot(div_trend, aes(x = year, y = total_dividends, color = symbol, group = symbol)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Dividend Growth Trend: Top 5",
    x = "Year", y = "Total Dividends",
    color = "Tickr"
  ) +
  theme_minial() # typo on purpose: should be theme_minimal
```
